description_long: This is a white, front-loading washing machine with a rectangular form and a circular glass door on the front panel. The control panel is located at the top front, featuring several dials and buttons, likely for selecting wash cycles and settings. The machine's exterior is primarily made of metal with a smooth, hard finish, and the door is transparent, allowing a partial view of the drum inside. Some cables and hoses are visible at the rear, indicating it is not currently installed. The washing machine sits on a rough, dark ground surface, suggesting it is in an outdoor or urban disposal context. There are no visible brand logos or detergent drawers on the exterior.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a circular glass door and a top-front control panel, set on a rough urban ground. Cables and hoses are visible at the back.
description_view_0: The front of the washing machine is visible, showing the circular glass door and the control panel with dials and buttons on the top front.
description_view_1: The left side and rear of the washing machine are visible, with cables and hoses extending from the back.
description_view_2: The rear and back of the washing machine are visible, with the door open and the drum partially exposed.
description_view_3: The right side of the washing machine is visible, with cables and hoses trailing behind.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the washing machine, featuring several round dials and buttons. The layout is linear and simple, with no visible digital display or detailed labeling.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular glass door with a visible handle on the right side of the door frame.
